data.subject: Welcome to PT Site
data.body: Welcome to our private torrent tracker! We are glad to have you here. Please read the rules and start uploading/downloading. Enjoy your stay!

data.subject: Account Activated
data.body: Your account has been activated. You can now upload and download torrents. Remember to maintain a good ratio!

data.subject: Upload Reminder
data.body: You haven't uploaded any torrents yet. Please contribute to the community by uploading quality content.

data.subject: Ratio Warning
data.body: Your download ratio is below the minimum required. Please upload more to improve your ratio.
